title: LAN Party Snack Plan
text:
## LAN Party Snack Plan

**Start time:** {number} PM, after everyone carries their {adjective} computer into the basement.

**Network setup:** {person} will {verb} the router while {number} people yell about {plural noun}.

**Approved snacks:**
- {adjective} chips
- {food} in a bowl shaped like a {object}
- One emergency {color} soda

**House rule:** If your character is defeated by a {animal}, you must {verb} and refill the ice tray.

**Status:** The night ends when the modem makes a {sound}.
